launch.title: Your life becomes an epic quest
launch.body: Strap in. Your habits, goals, and routines turn into quests that power up your hero — and carry you toward what you truly want.

dragons.title: Conquer the dragons in your way
dragons.body: Procrastination, doubt, distraction — name them, then beat them with focus battles and a coach at your side.

grow.title: From Novice to Luminary
grow.body: Earn XP, keep your streak alive, and watch your Wisp evolve from a Spark into a Phoenixling.

choose.title: Choose your hero
choose.subtitle: Same heroic spirit — pick the look that feels like you. Change it anytime.

attribution.title: How did you find Levellio?
attribution.subtitle: This helps us reach more people who need it.

focus.title: What do you want to work on?
focus.subtitle: Pick what matters most — we’ll build your plan around it.

fit.title: How do you like to train?
fit.subtitle: We’ll tailor your activities to your setup.

eat.title: How do you eat?
eat.subtitle: We’ll match recipes and activities to your diet.

partner.title: Where do you want to grow together?
partner.subtitle: We’ll suggest ways to nurture your relationship.

calm.title: What stresses you most?
calm.subtitle: We’ll point your practice where it helps most.

money.title: What’s your money goal?
money.subtitle: We’ll tailor your money habits to it.

grow.title: How do you like to grow?
grow.subtitle: We’ll shape your learning around it.

blocker.title: What’s been holding you back?
blocker.subtitle: We’ll help you face it head-on.

count.title: How many daily habits feel right?
count.subtitle: Start small — you can always add more.

reminder.title: When should we nudge you?
reminder.subtitle: We’ll time your reminders for then.

why.title: What’s your why?
why.subtitle: Your reason shows up when motivation dips (optional).
why.placeholder: e.g. to feel strong for my kids

commit.title: Ready to commit?
commit.subtitle: A tiny promise to yourself makes it real.

rating.title: Help others find Levellio
rating.subtitle: A quick rating means the world to a small team.

notify.title: Turn on reminders
notify.subtitle: A gentle nudge at the right time keeps your streak alive.

reveal.title: Here’s your personalized plan, {{name}}
reveal.subtitle: Add it to your app, or start fresh and build your own.
reveal.aiAdded: Added {{count}} AI recipes to your collection

prime.trialBody: Unlock the AI coach, forecast insights, premium themes and unlimited projects. At launch: 7 days free, then $29.99/yr. No charge during your trial — cancel anytime in Settings.
prime.remindBody: We’ll remind you 2 days before your trial ends. Cancel anytime in Settings.
prime.betaTitle: Plus is free while we’re in beta
prime.betaBody: You’re a founding member — every Plus feature is unlocked, free, with nothing to pay and nothing to set up.
prime.betaFuture: A 7-day free trial on the yearly plan, then $29.99/yr. No charge during your trial, a reminder before it ends, and cancel anytime in Settings.
